message:
fix(ci): explicitly add musl target via rustup in release workflow

The nightly toolchain may not have musl std pre-compiled, causing
"can't find crate for core" errors. Adding explicit rustup target add
ensures the target is available regardless of nightly component status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -96,6 +96,9 @@ jobs:
           toolchain: nightly
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
+      - name: Ensure target is installed
+        run: rustup target add ${{ matrix.target }}
+
       - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl)
         if: matrix.musl
         run: |
